description_long: This is a robust, cubic safe box constructed primarily from metallic materials, featuring a thick, reinforced door with prominent locking bolts. The door is mounted on the left side with visible external hinges and swings open to reveal a spacious, empty interior. The front of the door displays a classic circular combination lock mechanism, adding to its secure appearance. The exterior surface is smooth and metallic, with a subtle brushed finish that gives it a modern, industrial look. The safe stands on four small feet, slightly elevating it from the ground. No visible branding, ventilation slots, or decorative elements are present, emphasizing its utilitarian design.
description: A sturdy, metallic cubic safe box with a thick, reinforced door, combination lock, and smooth brushed finish. The door opens on left-side external hinges, revealing a spacious interior.
description_view_0: The safe box is seen from the side, showing a plain, smooth metallic surface with no visible features or openings.
description_view_1: This view shows the safe box with its thick door partially open, revealing the dark, reinforced edge and locking bolts.
description_view_2: The front view displays the open door with a visible circular combination lock and multiple locking bolts, as well as the empty interior.
description_view_3: The safe box is viewed from the opposite side, showing the door fully open on left-side external hinges and the smooth, featureless side panel.
